note: Neutral editor-host runtime contract: a compliant OpenVSCode-protocol browser-IDE server. The artifact is OPERATOR-SUPPLIED at provision time (set IOI_EDITOR_RUNTIME_URL to a pinned tarball) and verified against the sha256 below; it is NEVER vendored into the product tree and no reference-product/vendor-origin provenance is carried here. The daemon mounts any runtime that satisfies this contract; attribution for the operator-chosen runtime is the operator's responsibility (standard OSS NOTICE).
